question: Implement a `Car` class that exhibits composition with an `Engine` class. The `Engine` should be created and destroyed along with the `Car` object. Demonstrate this lifetime management.

test_cases.expected:
--- Demonstrating Correct Composition and Lifetime Management ---

Creating a Car object: myCar.
Engine V8-12345 created.
Car Sedan X created with Engine V8-12345.
Car Sedan X is driving.
Engine V8-12345 starting...
myCar model: Sedan X

Creating another Car object: yourCar.
Engine V6-67890 created.
Car SUV Z created with Engine V6-67890.
Car SUV Z is driving.
Engine V6-67890 starting...

Both cars are active. Now leaving the scope.
Car SUV Z destroying.
Engine V6-67890 destroyed.
Car SUV Z destroyed.
Car Sedan X destroying.
Engine V8-12345 destroyed.
Car Sedan X destroyed.

All Car objects (and their Engines) have been destroyed.
